query: INSERT INTO feedback (id, message_id, user_id, rating, comment, agent_id, model) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, ($4::text)::feedback_rating, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT (message_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = EXCLUDED.rating, comment = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.comment, feedback.comment), agent_id = EXCLUDED.agent_id, model = EXCLUDED.model, updated_at = now() RETURNING id
